title: deyeuxia monticola
intro: Deyeuxia monticola, also known as the Chinese feather grass or mountain grass, is a species of grass native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Deyeuxia monticola include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and lower blood pressure. Deyeuxia monticola is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
